# cmccloudv2_apigateway (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor id
- `name` (String) The name of the ApiGateway instance
- `public_access` (Boolean) If set to true, this api gateway can be access from public network
- `subnet_id` (String) Subnet id
- `volume_size` (Number) The size of the volume in GB
- `volume_type` (String) The volume type
- `zones` (Set of String) Currently only 1 zone is supported

### Optional

- `bandwidth` (Number) Required if public_access is set to true
- `mode` (String) Mode of the ApiGateway instance, currently only `standalone` is supported
- `tags` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The created time of the ApiGateway instance
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) The status of the ApiGateway instance

<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the tag
- `value` (String) The value of the tag


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
